body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/queryProcess 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/queryProcess 
 ## 接口描述 
1. 此接口用于查询批量下载任务进度，需要先调用接口v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport发起下载任务，获取返回的批次号；
2. 根据1中返回的批次号，调用此接口可以查询该批次每个单据的下载进度（下载进度包含下载中或者已完成）；
3. 下载完成的单据可以通过接口v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice 下载对应的压缩文件。
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"requestId","required":true,"maxLength":"20","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E5%BD%93%E6%94%B6%E4%B8%8D%E5%88%B0%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E8%BF%9B%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"1234"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2023110600451801","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"fileList","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E5%A4%9A%E6%97%B6%E4%BC%9A%E6%9C%89%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA","exampleValue":"%5B%222024030611921094.zip%22%5D"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"reason","label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%EF%BC%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%2F%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","desc":"%200-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%B8%AD%3B1-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E4%B8%AD%EF%BC%9B2-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90","exampleValue":"0-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%B8%AD%3B1-%E9%87%8D%E5%90%AF%E4%B8%AD%EF%BC%9B2-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%EF%BC%9B9-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"crtTim","label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"1709691518000","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"revTim","label":"%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"1709772009000","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"requestSeqId","label":"%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"217474","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
` {BaseURL}/api/v1/invoice/queryProcess?OPAUID=XFT00001&requestId=1234`


###返回示例
```json
[
  {
    "billId": 2024030611921094,
    "comId": 35676,
    "crtTim": 1709691518000,
    "fileList": [
      "2024030611921094.zip"
    ],
    "reason": "",
    "requestSeqId": 217474,
    "revTim": 1709772009000,
    "status": "2"
  }
]
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------------------|
| 200      | 成功                 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/queryProcess

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/queryProcess

接口描述

  1. 此接口用于查询批量下载任务进度，需要先调用接口v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport发起下载任务，获取返回的批次号；
  2. 根据1中返回的批次号，调用此接口可以查询该批次每个单据的下载进度（下载进度包含下载中或者已完成）；
  3. 下载完成的单据可以通过接口v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice 下载对应的压缩文件。

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"requestId","required":true,"maxLength":"20","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E5%BD%93%E6%94%B6%E4%B8%8D%E5%88%B0%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E8%BF%9B%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"1234"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2023110600451801","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"fileList","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E5%A4%9A%E6%97%B6%E4%BC%9A%E6%9C%89%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA","exampleValue":"%5B%222024030611921094.zip%22%5D"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"reason","label":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%EF%BC%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%2F%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","desc":"%200-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%B8%AD%3B1-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E4%B8%AD%EF%BC%9B2-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90","exampleValue":"0-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%B8%AD%3B1-%E9%87%8D%E5%90%AF%E4%B8%AD%EF%BC%9B2-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%EF%BC%9B9-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"crtTim","label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"1709691518000","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"DATE","name":"revTim","label":"%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"1709772009000","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"requestSeqId","label":"%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E4%BB%BB%E5%8A%A1%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"217474","required":true}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/v1/invoice/queryProcess?OPAUID=XFT00001&requestId=1234

###返回示例

[
  {
    "billId": 2024030611921094,
    "comId": 35676,
    "crtTim": 1709691518000,
    "fileList": [
      "2024030611921094.zip"
    ],
    "reason": "",
    "requestSeqId": 217474,
    "revTim": 1709772009000,
    "status": "2"
  }
]

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
